channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: England's Woad storms into Evian Championship lead as Korda misses cut
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England's Lottie Woad shot a seven-under-par 64 to claim the halfway lead at the Amundi Evian Championship as she seeks her first major victory.

item.title: Man City sign Charles from Chelsea
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Manchester City have signed Niamh Charles from Chelsea on a three-year deal.

item.title: Nat’l Assembly Moves To Tackle Femicide As Advocacy Push Gains Momentum
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Efforts to combat the rising cases of femicide and gender-related killings of women and girls in Nigeria received a major boost on Thursday as the DOHS Cares Foundation and the Gender Technical Unit (GTU) of the House of Representatives advanced plans for a dedicated Femicide Prevention Bill. The ad

item.title: 2027: I’ll quit presidential race if Kenneth Okonkwo’s evidence proves me unfit – Peter Obi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, Peter Obi, has vowed to withdraw from the 2027 election if any evidence presented by Kenneth Okonkwo proves him unfit to serve. Obi had filed a defamation suit against Okonkwo, who was recently appointed as spokesman of African Democrat

item.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

item.title: Landslides Kill 15 In Philippines As Typhoon Nears Taiwan
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Fifteen people were killed in landslides in the Philippines, and thousands in Taiwan were evacuated from their homes as the biggest typhoon in decades neared […] The post Landslides Kill 15 In Philippines As Typhoon Nears Taiwan appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: NBA Crisis: States Attorneys-General Call Emergency General Council Meeting
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Body of State Attorneys-General has intervened in the leadership crisis affecting the Nigerian Bar Association (NBA), calling for the immediate convening of an emergency meeting of the General Council of the Bar (GCB) to resolve the dispute endangering the unity of the legal profession. The body

item.title: Spain-Belgium live: Roja's perfect defence meets Red Devils' resilience in World Cup quarter-finals
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Spain and Belgium clash in a tasteful quarter-final encounter, with both European nations seeking to reach the World Cup semi-finals. The Roja and the Red Devils bring contrasting styles and experiences to this knockout tie, but only one of them will advance to face France in the final four. Follow

item.title: What the big housing bill means for buyers as home prices hit new record high
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: President Trump is refusing to sign the housing bill, but it will still become law on Saturday. Here’s what it does — and doesn’t — do.

item.title: Paris court hands monitor 18-month suspended sentence for assaulting preschooler in abuse scandal
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: A Paris court handed a school monitor an 18-month suspended prison sentence on Friday for sexually abusing a kindergarten-age child. It's the first such guilty verdict since the French capital was rocked by a wave of allegations of child sex abuse by non-teaching staff in Paris's public school syste

item.title: NYSC reforms: Gowon, ex-Nigerian Presidents urged to intervene to protect national interest
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The National Alliance for Democracy, NAD, has called on ex-Nigerian military ruler, General Yakubu Gowon, the founder of the National Youth Service Corps, NYSC, and all former Presidents of Nigeria to urgently intervene in the ongoing proposed reforms of the scheme. The group expressed deep concern

item.title: Woad takes Evian Championship lead following final-hole birdie
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lottie Woad birdies her final hole of the second round of the Amundi Evian Championship to take the lead, as she shoots a seven-under-par 64.

item.title: Nnamdi Kanu’s wife breaks silence on reports of filing for divorce
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Uchechi Okwu-Kanu, wife of detained Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB) leader Nnamdi Kanu, has dismissed reports claiming she filed for divorce... The post Nnamdi Kanu’s wife breaks silence on reports of filing for divorce appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Kwara: Two Suspected Kidnappers In Police Net
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Kwara State Police Command has arrested two suspected collaborators linked to the kidnapping of three persons in Ifelodun Local Government Area, saying the operation was part of an ongoing crackdown on kidnapping networks across the State. The suspects, identified as Sauni Shehu and Auwalu Bala,

item.title: CardinalStone cuts Nigeria’s 2026 growth forecast to 4.2%, sees rate cuts after 2027 elections
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Investment firm CardinalStone has revised its forecast for Nigeria’s economic growth in 2026 to 4.2%, down from an earlier projection of 4.4%, citing weaker-than-expected performance in key sectors and the continued impact of elevated inflation and interest rates. The revised outlook is contained i

item.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn as shares surge in bumper US listing
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.

item.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

item.title: Zulu king expresses regret after video captures tirade against his wife
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: In the footage widely shared in South Africa, King Misuzulu threatens to physically assault his wife and accuses her of cheating.

item.title: UNILORIN’s Israel Adeniyi emerges overall best graduating student of Nigerian Law School
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: A University of Ilorin (UNILORIN) graduate, Israel Adekunle Adeniyi, has emerged as the Overall Best Graduating Student of the Nigerian Law School... The post UNILORIN’s Israel Adeniyi emerges overall best graduating student of Nigerian Law School appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Court upholds FCCPC’s powers to investigate Air Peace over ticket pricing complaints
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Federal High Court ruled that investigating consumer complaints over airfares is different from regulating ticket prices, affirming the consumer protection commission’s powers under the law. The post Court upholds FCCPC’s powers to investigate Air Peace over ticket pricing complaints appeared fi

item.title: Court awards N100m against police over 22-year-old boy murder
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Onyekachi Mba was beaten and shot by police security personnel at the Government House, Calabar, on 1 August 2025. The post Court awards N100m against police over 22-year-old boy murder appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Sack Ancelotti Now -Brazil Legend
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Brazilian legend Romário has called for the immediate dismissal of national team manager Carlo Ancelotti, labeling Brazil’s early FIFA World Cup 2026 exit to Norway as a disgrace and an embarrassment. He strongly criticized Ancelotti’s tactical choices and demanded that the Brazilian Foo

item.title: Delta's fuel bill exploded. The airline's refinery gamble offered some relief.
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Stakeholders Call For Urgent Action To Support Women In Conflict Zones
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Civil society leaders, development partners, and women’s rights advocates have called for urgent and coordinated efforts to protect and empower women caught in violent conflicts across Nigeria. They warn that thousands continue to suffer from the devastating effects of insecurity and have limi

item.title: NPFL: Niger Tornadoes sack feeder team technical crew
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Niger Tornadoes have sacked the technical crew and supporting staff of their feeder team. The disengagement is part of the clubs restructuring process for the 2026-27 season. Niger Tornadoes announced the dissolution in a statement signed by the club’s secretary Haruna Jibrin on Friday. A

item.title: EFCC Arraigns Construction Firm GMD Over Alleged $600,000 Money Laundering
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has arraigned the Group Managing Director of Brass Engineering and Construction Nigeria Limited, Egwuche Chinyere Gladys, over an alleged $600,000 fraud and money laundering case. This was disclosed in a post on the EFCC’s official X page on

item.title: Governors cannot direct police, DSS, military without federal approval – Makinde
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The presidential candidate of the Allied Peoples Movement (APM) and Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, has said governors lack the constitutional powers to issue operational directives to security agencies, arguing that their role in addressing insecurity is largely limited despite being designated a

item.title: Trump says US has ‘agreed’ to continue Iran talks but ceasefire ‘over’
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Iran has not responded to Trump's latest claim, which comes as new attacks threaten the full resumption of war.

item.title: Broos remains Bafana Bafana head coach — South Africa FA
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: South Africa have dismissed reports that Hugo Broos has stepped down as Bafana Bafana head coach following the team's historic 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign. The post Broos remains Bafana Bafana head coach — South Africa FA appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Tinubu acknowledges pain of reforms, calls projects “surgery” to save economy at Wasa commissioning
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: President Bola Tinubu on Friday acknowledged the hardship Nigerians are experiencing under his administration’s economic reforms, describing the measures as “difficult but necessary surgeries” as he commissioned access roads, power and water to the Informal Sector Layout in Wasa District. The post T

item.title: Netflix is turning into YouTube
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Netflix has shows and movies. And video games. And live sports. And podcasts. And also, apparently, YouTube videos? For a company that used to seem like the next big thing in TV, it all feels a little frenetic, and maybe a tad desperate. For a company that sees sleep as its primary competitor, it mi

item.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

item.title: Edwards Steps Down As CEO Of Football At Liverpool Owners FSG
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Michael Edwards has left his position as Chief Executive Officer of Football for Fenway Sports Group (FSG), Liverpool’s ownership group. He departed two years into a three-year contract, prompted by frustration over FSG’s failure to acquire a second European club to form a multi-club mod

item.title: Gov Yusuf Inaugurates Committee For 2027 Re-Election Campaign
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The committee is expected to engage different stakeholders to generate policy ideas and recommendations for a comprehensive and inclusive development agenda. The post Gov Yusuf Inaugurates Committee For 2027 Re-Election Campaign appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Nobody wants Peter Obi dead – Umahi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Minister of Works, David Umahi, has said nobody is threatening the life of Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC,.presidential candidate, Peter Obi. Umahi while inspecting some legacy projects in Ebonyi State, dismissed Obi’s statement that political opponents want him dead. He attributed Obi&#8217

item.title: Who is Fadel Shaker? Lebanese pop star released on bail
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: In 2012, singing star Shaker quit his music career, before being accused of joining an armed group in Lebanon.

item.title: CREDICORP, NGGCL sign risk-sharing deal to expand consumer credit for Nigerians
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The Nigerian Consumer Credit Corporation (CREDICORP) and the National Credit Guarantee Company Limited (NCGCL) have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to establish a risk-sharing partnership aimed at expanding access to consumer credit for qualified Nigerians. This was disclosed in a stateme

item.title: NUJ seeks regular training for education journalists
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Chairman of the Nigeria Union of Journalists (NUJ), FCT Council, Grace Ike, has called on the Universal Basic Education Commission (UBEC) to institutionalise regular media briefings and strengthen the capacity of education correspondents through continuous training and field engagements. The post NU

item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: The Badminton Association of Japan donated training equipment to the Badminton Federation of Nigeria (BFN) under Japan’s Sport for Tomorrow initiative. The National Sports Commission (NSC) disclosed this on their X handle on Friday. The presentation, held at the Package B Indoor Sports Hall of

item.title: DGN Confab Urges Responsible AI Use To Protect African Storytelling Traditions
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Stakeholders in Nigeria’s creative industry have called for the responsible adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI), warning that the technology must complement—not replace—human creativity if Africa’s rich storytelling heritage is to be preserved. The call was made at the end of a thre

item.title: Super Eagles transfers: Frankfurt join Galatasaray in race for 26-cap Nigeria star
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: German side Eintracht Frankfurt have entered the race to sign Super Eagles midfielder Raphael Onyedika from Club Brugge in the summer transfer window, Soccernet.ng reports. Onyedika’s future has become uncertain, especially after entering the final year of his contract with the Belgian club earlier

item.title: Police credit joint patrols for decline in Katsina attacks
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force in Katsina State has attributed a decline in bandit attacks over the past two years to joint security operations involving multiple agencies and support from the state government, while calling on residents to provide timely intelligence to sustain the gains. The post Police

item.title: 2026 W’CUP: Things To Know As Spain Takes On Belgium
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Closing in on a second FIFA World Cup title, former champions Spain will lock horns with Belgium in Friday’s second quarterfinal at the 2026 tournament. The two European heavyweights will meet in Los Angeles, with the winner advancing to a semifinal showdown against either France or Morocco. M

item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Alexander Zverev will face reigning Wimbledon champion Jannik Sinner or seven-time winner Novak ​Djokovic in the final.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The National leadership of the All Progressives Congress (APC), on Friday, formally announced Vice President Kashim Shettima as the running mate to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for the 2027 presidential election. The announcement was made at a meeting attended by members of the Progressive Governors

item.title: Fubara Presents N1.8trn 2026 Budget To Rivers Assembly
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Rivers State governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara on Friday, presented the 2026 budget estimate of N1,854,248,734,475.76 only to the State House of Assembly. The budget, titled “Budget of Resilience for Growth and Development”, Fubara said, is the result of considerable public participation in a

item.title: How Nigeria Police officers aided N1.6bn travel scam – Nepalese national reveals
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A Nepalese national, identified simply as Bista, has disclosed how some officers at the Nigeria Police Force headquarters in Abuja played a role in a fraudulent scheme that cost him about N1.6 billion. Bista made the allegation in an interview with social media activist, Martins Vincent Otse, popula

item.title: Delta faces jet-fuel jitters even as it sees strong travel demand
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Delta’s profit dropped as the air carrier absorbed the highest quarterly fuel expense in its history.

item.title: “Eliminating Repentant Bandits, Secessionists Against Religious, International Law” – Sheikh Gumi Replies Defense Minister
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Islamic cleric, Sheikh Ahmad Gumi, has criticised calls for the killing of repentant insurgents and secessionists, saying such actions are contrary to religious teachings and international law. Gumi made the remarks in a Facebook post on Friday, days after lawmakers urged the Federal Government to e

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: The owners of Eurasian Resources Group are considering splitting the mining group into two businesses, in an overhaul that would separate its Kazakh and international operations.

item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: The South Korean memory company’s American depositary receipts begin trading on Friday.

item.title: Justice Ministry, NIMC Strengthen Collaboration On Anti-Corruption
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Minister of Justice and Attorney-General of the Federation, Lateef Fagbemi (SAN), has said Nigeria’s newly signed National Identity Management (NIMC) law will strengthen the country’s anti-corruption drive, improve governance, and support the development of a secure digital economy.

item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Marques Colston, former wide receiver for the New Orleans Saints, discusses the focus of his private sports venture 'The Champion Fund,' and his efforts to make sports investing accessible to all. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

item.title: Shock as ex-UK Minister Ann Widdecombe found dead; murder probe begins
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Devon and Cornwall Police confirmed on Friday that Widdecombe was discovered dead inside her rural Devon home after officers were called by the ambulance service at about 11:40 a.m. BST on July 9.

item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Manchester City have signed England international Niamh Charles for £500,000 from Women's Super League rivals Chelsea.

item.description: Known for his combative politics and fiery rhetoric, Abuja’s ambassador to Pretoria is tasked with defusing a crisis fuelled by anti-immigrant attacks in South Africa, mass evacuations and Nigeria’s growing calls for retaliation.

item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: At least 12 people have died and 23 remain missing after Spain's deadliest wildfire in two decades tore through the southern region of Almeria, with authorities saying the blaze may have started when a power line fell onto dry vegetation. item.description: Belgian cyclist Tim Merlier won the Tour de France's seventh stage in a sprint finish in Bordeaux under scorching temperatures while reigning champion Tadej Pogacar kept the leader's yellow jersey.

item.description: Wells' body was found in the water near Mississippi's Horn Island days after he went on a boating trip there with friends.

item.title: UITH management condemns assault on medical doctor by patient’s relative
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Management of the University of Ilorin Teaching Hospital, UITH, has condemned the physical assault of one of the hospital’s medical doctors by a relative of a patient. The UITH management reacted to the incident in a statement released in Ilorin on Friday by the Head of Corporate

item.title: Afternoon session: England take big wickets of Mandhana and Harmanpreet
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Highlights of the morning and afternoon sessions on day one of the Women's Test between England and India.

item.title: Police rescue 4 kidnap victims after gun duel in Abuja
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: According to her, upon receipt of the report, the command immediately deployed operatives of the Anti-Kidnapping Unit and 24 Police Mobile Force Squadron to the scene. The post Police rescue 4 kidnap victims after gun duel in Abuja appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: My doctor friend objected to his hospital’s fundraising tactics. Did management go too far?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “This shocking program was exploiting doctors and the trust inherent in their relationships with patients.”

item.title: Jesus reunites with Ronaldo as new Portugal head coach
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Jorge Jesus is named Portugal's new head coach on a four-year contract to run through to the 2030 World Cup.

item.title: ADC faction withdraws from Edo local elections, gives reasons
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party has also announced its boycott of the election. The post ADC faction withdraws from Edo local elections, gives reasons appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: FG Seeks Bombardier Support For Nigeria Airlines
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The federal government of Nigeria has concluded its strategic engagement with the world’s leading aircraft Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) as the Minister of Aviation and Aerospace Development, Festus Keyamo led a delegation of Nigerian airline operators on a working visit to Bombardie
